entries.title: Changelog page
entries.summary: There's now a public /changelog where you can see what's shipped recently across the site, games, and developer platform. Entries are grouped by month and link to the underlying commit.

entries.title: One-click "Copy AI prompt" for new API keys
entries.summary: When you create a new developer API key, the reveal panel now has a Copy AI prompt button. It copies a self-contained prompt — your real key inlined plus the full WebRTC signaling spec — that you can paste into ChatGPT, Claude, or Cursor to scaffold a working browser-TS host + controller client in one shot.
